app.name: HuanQi
app.tagline: Find people who share the same surreal sensation

auth.ageGate: You must be 17 or older to use HuanQi.

sensation.title: Write your sensation
sensation.hint: Describe a surreal bodily or perceptual experience in your own words. No tags, photos, or appearance details.
sensation.englishOnly: V1 accepts English sensation records only.

contact.title: Contact
contact.hint: Only your login email can be shared, and only after you unlock and confirm a match.

library.title: Resonance library
library.empty: No sensations yet. Be the first to publish.

matches.title: Your matches
matches.noChat: HuanQi does not include in-app messaging.

settings.title: Settings
settings.disclaimer: HuanQi only computes text similarity. Off-platform contact is at your own risk.

errors.moderationBlocked: This sensation cannot be published under our content rules.
errors.notEnglish: Please write your sensation in English for this version.
